title: ApprovalDecision
description: Protocol-owned approval decision family for hash-bound approval outcomes, approver attribution, and explicit consumption semantics. Decisions are signed by trusted approval authorities and can bind step-up assurance evidence hashes without making delivery channels authoritative.

schema_id.description: Stable protocol object-family identifier for approval decisions.

schema_version.description: Exact protocol schema version used to validate this approval decision.

approval_request_hash.description: Hash of the approval request this decision resolves.

approver.description: Shared principal identity for the human or trusted component that issued this approval decision.

decision_outcome.description: Outcome applied to the referenced approval request.

approval_assurance_level.description: Assurance level achieved by the approval authority before issuing this decision. Unknown values fail closed.

presence_mode.description: User-presence mode satisfied for this approval decision. Unknown values fail closed.

key_protection_posture.description: Protection posture of the signing authority key used for this decision.

identity_binding_posture.description: Identity binding posture for the signer and associated verification path.

approval_assertion_hash.description: Optional hash of user step-up assertion bytes verified by the approval authority and bound into this signed decision.

decided_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp recording when the decision was produced.

consumption_posture.description: How the approval may be consumed after issuance. MVP approvals are single-use only.

decision_expires_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp recording when this approval decision stops being valid, if it expires before consumption. This field is optional because MVP decisions are already single-use and may rely on consumption rather than a second timestamp bound.

restrictions_schema_id.description: Schema identifier for an optional machine-checkable restrictions payload attached to this decision.

restrictions.description: Optional machine-checkable restrictions or notes attached to the decision.

policy_decision_hash.description: Optional hash of the policy decision that prompted the human approval flow.

stage_manifest_summary_hash.description: Optional hash of the stage manifest summary the approver acted on.

signatures.description: Detached signatures attesting to the exact approval decision payload contents over RFC 8785 JCS canonical bytes.

items.description: Detached signature block for the approval decision payload.
